action: Pick one finished artwork that might be sellable
why: Creates the starting point for a catalog or sales test
done_condition: One finished piece is named or described in Discord

action: Take one clear photo of the chosen artwork
why: Makes the piece usable for cataloging sharing and pricing
done_condition: One clear photo is posted in Discord or saved for the catalog

action: Write one working title for the chosen artwork
why: Turns finished art into a business asset with a name
done_condition: One title is posted in Discord

action: Write one sentence describing the chosen artwork
why: Creates reusable copy for a listing post or portfolio entry
done_condition: One plain-language sentence is posted in Discord

action: Choose whether the chosen artwork should be tested as an original print sticker or card
why: Moves the piece toward a concrete product path
done_condition: One product path is chosen in Discord

action: Name one person who might like seeing the chosen artwork
why: Starts a small low-pressure audience or buyer test
done_condition: One possible supporter or buyer is named privately or in Discord
